'''ngogapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubbish|tubbish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubbish|tubbish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngogapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogapithi|ngogapithi]] || [[word:ngogapiji|ngogapiji]] || [[word:ngogapishi|ngogapishi]] || [[word:ngogapiki|ngogapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogaputhuthu|ngogaputhuthu]] || [[word:ngogapujuju|ngogapujuju]] || [[word:ngogapushushu|ngogapushushu]] || [[word:ngogapukuku|ngogapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogaputhu|ngogaputhu]] || [[word:ngogapuju|ngogapuju]] || [[word:ngogapushu|ngogapushu]] || [[word:ngogapuku|ngogapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogapufthuf|ngogapufthuf]] || [[word:ngogapufjuf|ngogapufjuf]] || [[word:ngogapufshuf|ngogapufshuf]] || [[word:ngogapufkuf|ngogapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogapethe|ngogapethe]] || [[word:ngogapeje|ngogapeje]] || [[word:ngogapeshe|ngogapeshe]] || [[word:ngogapeke|ngogapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogapothotho|ngogapothotho]] || [[word:ngogapojojo|ngogapojojo]] || [[word:ngogaposhosho|ngogaposhosho]] || [[word:ngogapokoko|ngogapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogapotho|ngogapotho]] || [[word:ngogapojo|ngogapojo]] || [[word:ngogaposho|ngogaposho]] || [[word:ngogapoko|ngogapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogapofthof|ngogapofthof]] || [[word:ngogapofjof|ngogapofjof]] || [[word:ngogapofshof|ngogapofshof]] || [[word:ngogapofkof|ngogapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogapĂŠthĂŠ|ngogapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogapĂŠjĂŠ|ngogapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogapĂŠshĂŠ|ngogapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogapĂŠkĂŠ|ngogapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogapathatha|ngogapathatha]] || [[word:ngogapajaja|ngogapajaja]] || [[word:ngogapashasha|ngogapashasha]] || [[word:ngogapakaka|ngogapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogapatha|ngogapatha]] || [[word:ngogapaja|ngogapaja]] || [[word:ngogapasha|ngogapasha]] || [[word:ngogapaka|ngogapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogapafthaf|ngogapafthaf]] || [[word:ngogapafjaf|ngogapafjaf]] || [[word:ngogapafshaf|ngogapafshaf]] || [[word:ngogapafkaf|ngogapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngogapasha|ngogapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogapshĂ«sha|ngogapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogaprosha|ngogaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogapmusha|ngogapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogapyasha|ngogapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogapnkshĂ«sha|gongogapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogapnkrosha|gongogapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogapnkmusha|gongogapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogapnkyasha|gongogapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngogagapasha|ngogagapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogagapshĂ«sha|ngogagapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogagaprosha|ngogagaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogagapmusha|ngogagapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogagapyasha|ngogagapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogagapnkshĂ«sha|gongogagapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogagapnkrosha|gongogagapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogagapnkmusha|gongogagapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogagapnkyasha|gongogagapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngegĂŠpasha|ngegĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngegĂŠpshĂ«sha|ngegĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngegĂŠprosha|ngegĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngegĂŠpmusha|ngegĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngegĂŠpyasha|ngegĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongegĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gongegĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongegĂŠpnkrosha|gongegĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongegĂŠpnkmusha|gongegĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongegĂŠpnkyasha|gongegĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngogfapasha|ngogfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogfapshĂ«sha|ngogfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogfaprosha|ngogfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogfapmusha|ngogfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogfapyasha|ngogfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogfapnkshĂ«sha|gongogfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogfapnkrosha|gongogfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogfapnkmusha|gongogfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogfapnkyasha|gongogfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
